value.found_quote: Codex uses platform-native enforcement on each OS. The implementation differs between macOS, Linux, WSL2, and native Windows, but the idea is the same across surfaces: give the agent a bounded place to work so routine tasks can run autonomously inside clear limits.
value.rationale: The page explicitly states that Codex (OpenAI) uses platform-native enforcement for its sandbox on each OS, directly substantiating the claim. It is described as applied automatically in default mode, indicating an active offering.
